notes: Msvm_VssService 类暴露 QueryGuestClusterInformation(OUT GuestClusterInformation: Msvm_GuestClusterInformation)。该类为来宾服务，superclass 为 Msvm_GuestService。
关键限制：Msvm_VssService 是来宾侧服务，仅当来宾 OS 已安装并运行集成服务(VSS/备份组件)并向主机回报时，才存在与该虚拟机关联的 INSTANCE。在无 OS 的空测试虚拟机上 $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VssService') 为空，因此 QueryGuestClusterInformation 无法在无来宾 OS 的虚拟机上调用。这是 API 设计使然。

Msvm_GuestClusterInformation(纯 OUT 嵌入返回)字段：ClusterId, ClusterSize, IsActiveActive, IsClustered, IsOnline, IsOwned, LastResourceMoveTime, SharedVirtualHardDiskPaths, SharedVirtualHardDisks，用于读取来宾 OS 所在故障转移群集的信息。

Msvm_VssComponentSettingData 是每虚拟机的 VSS 集成组件设置(继承 CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData)，每台虚拟机默认 1 个实例，EnabledState=2(启用)，经 VSSD.GetRelated('Msvm_VssComponentSettingData') 枚举。它对应虚拟机的‘备份(卷影复制)’集成服务开关；EnabledState 2=启用、3=禁用，可用 ModifyResourceSettings 修改。
此操作为纯读取(kind=read)：可确认类与方法 schema 存在、每虚拟机的 VssComponentSettingData 可枚举读回，以及 QueryGuestClusterInformation 需要活跃来宾群集这一调用前置条件。
调用 QueryGuestClusterInformation 的前置条件：来宾运行 Windows Server 故障转移群集且 Hyper-V 集成服务在线。此时 $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VssService') 返回实例，调用后从 ret.GuestClusterInformation 读取 ClusterId/ClusterSize/IsClustered 等字段。
title_en: Query Guest Cluster and VSS Integration Component Information
notes_en: The Msvm_VssService class exposes QueryGuestClusterInformation(OUT GuestClusterInformation: Msvm_GuestClusterInformation). This class is a guest service whose superclass is Msvm_GuestService.

Key limitation: Msvm_VssService is a guest-side service, and an INSTANCE associated with the virtual machine exists only when the guest OS has the integration services (VSS/backup components) installed, running, and reporting to the host. On an empty test virtual machine with no OS, $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VssService') is empty, so QueryGuestClusterInformation cannot be invoked on a virtual machine without a guest OS. This is by API design.

Msvm_GuestClusterInformation (a pure OUT embedded return) fields: ClusterId, ClusterSize, IsActiveActive, IsClustered, IsOnline, IsOwned, LastResourceMoveTime, SharedVirtualHardDiskPaths, SharedVirtualHardDisks, used to read information about the failover cluster to which the guest OS belongs.

Msvm_VssComponentSettingData is the per-VM VSS integration component setting data (deriving from CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData), with one instance per virtual machine by default and EnabledState=2 (enabled), enumerated via VSSD.GetRelated('Msvm_VssComponentSettingData'). It corresponds to the virtual machine's 'Backup (volume shadow copy)' integration service toggle; EnabledState 2 = enabled, 3 = disabled, and it can be modified with ModifyResourceSettings.

This operation is read-only (kind=read): it confirms that the class and method schema exist, that the per-VM VssComponentSettingData can be enumerated and read back, and that QueryGuestClusterInformation has the invocation precondition of requiring an active guest cluster.

Preconditions for invoking QueryGuestClusterInformation: the guest runs a Windows Server failover cluster and the Hyper-V integration services are online. In that case $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VssService') returns an instance, and after the call the ClusterId/ClusterSize/IsClustered and other fields are read from ret.GuestClusterInformation.
